allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const hs = require\(''./src/hubspot''\); hs.searchContactsAdvanced\({ ownerAssignedFrom: ''2026-03-01'', ownerAssignedTo: ''2026-03-19'' }\).then\(r => console.log\(''SUCCESS:'', r.length, ''contacts''\)\).catch\(e => console.log\(''FAILED:'', e.body?.message || e.message\)\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "Stopped PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "No process on port 3000" })
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force })
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "Stopped" } else { "none" })
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Server running \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "NOT running" })
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "stopped" } else { "none" })

Bash(node -e "const {canonicalCountry}=require\('./src/geography'\); ['US','usa','California','Calabasas, CA','Newberg, Oregon','West Palm Beach, Florida','NY','London','Toronto','München','México','The Netherlands','Bogotá, Cundinamarca','Austin','Gauteng','Hong Kong','Cayman Islands'].forEach\(c=>console.log\(c,'->',canonicalCountry\(c\)\)\)")
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "running PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "not running" })

Bash(node -e "const {toEtDate,etMidnightMs,nextDay}=require\('./src/datetime'\); console.log\('UTC 2026-06-12T02:00Z \(=Jun 11 ET\) ->', toEtDate\('2026-06-12T02:00:00Z'\)\); console.log\('etMidnight 2026-06-12 ->', new Date\(etMidnightMs\('2026-06-12'\)\).toISOString\(\)\); console.log\('nextDay 2026-06-30 ->', nextDay\('2026-06-30'\)\);")
